[吃瓜][吃瓜][吃瓜][吃瓜][吃瓜][吃瓜][吃瓜][吃瓜]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1761306742,"group_id":"7466862363686226968","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"小说！思想翱翔于天！夜晚，天空，望繁星入迷！（好书在旧）","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NzcYqiM+SUCiPiJsihbDGlE=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/c03234a358f54533bb0717a9bd1d08bd~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776880014&x-signature=0chpUzOod26ovusKJIMqZ1C4o7M%3D","user_id":"109917622886","user_name":"皇一君"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"109917622886","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":true,"sticker":{"expire_time":1774929499,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFF3DD","can_worn":false,"id":2,"name":"永不书荒","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/2c704b96a929a7a8b3461ddbf49a8d01","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b93ef223f8131d9ee8e8312f642d9681"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"svip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/07d37b2c30d271228698f77f4f7f7daf","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d67f15fefbb4470bb54c773eb84e90d8","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"svip","title_id":"svip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"svip"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7466862363686226968","book_info":{"abstract":"了无牵挂的顾阳被一块残缺石盘选中，从此踏上了游历诸天万界，问道觅长生的旅程。
年代剧里，顾阳经历岁月流逝，体悟人间真情。
《碧血剑》中，顾阳起于乱世，习武强身，力挽天倾。
《小李飞刀》，顾阳与李寻欢把酒言欢，纵横江湖。
《雪花女神龙》，龙魂刀、凤血剑是否真能左右人间真情？
《驱魔警察》武术加法术，鬼也挡不住……
《白蛇传》九重天阙太清冷，愿做人间红尘仙……
长生路漫漫，且看顾阳踏遍诸天，问心、问情、问道、问长生……
已穿越：《乔家的儿女》《碧血剑》《神雕侠侣》《小李飞刀》《小鱼儿与花无缺》《雪花女神龙》《司藤》《水月洞天》《港诡综合》《仙剑三》《白蛇传》《欢天地喜七仙女》《女娲传说之灵珠》《宝莲灯》

ration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":90110,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":4535},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1761319737,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7472251012654007102","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"话说情景喜剧可以写吗？如果可以写的话推荐
《糊涂小天使》，情景喜剧里的魔幻剧，可以学个魔法。优点是都市，如果不去做死的话不会有太大危险。缺点是只能当成魔法入门。
《家有外星人》系列，《超人马大姐》，《奇异家庭》中出现过外星人。可以去里面学习下外星科技。至于危险，情景喜剧里面至少死不了人。（狗头）
《非常岳母》，可以说是最容易在现代学习修仙功法的，因为那个世界存在天庭。","text_exts":[{"e":87,"s":84,"text":"外星人","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%A4%96%E6%98%9F%E4%BA%BA&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317742834475A76898D%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227472251012654007102%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227466862363686226968%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%A4%96%E6%98%9F%E4%BA%BA%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1739772690,"group_id":"7466862363686226968","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/ag9rcRDgN7cYuBuEFP9gdh8OW1hhD+medFpiSjdPZZ","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/5fe32ec9843c441fb6a66466d7adcb5a~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776875235&x-signature=neSKwVeJgzOE5tavX%2FOtZc6pJXk%3D","user_id":"3008691887673640","user_name":"永恒轮回"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3008691887673640","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":true,"sticker":{"expire_time":1774754986,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE1DD","can_worn":false,"id":1,"name":"吃瓜群众","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/99d8abedb53eea031f973b1251119d85","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/eaf916cdd4f4860ea2a74b0d0e3718f1"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"svip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/07d37b2c30d271228698f77f4f7f7daf","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/ori
